{"society_power": 6.4, "state_power": 8.0, "society_change": -0.3, "state_change": 0.7, "key_event": "Wartime state expansion, Quit India repression, Bengal Famine", "reasoning": "Wartime economic controls, army growth, and repression of Quit India sharply expanded the despotic colonial state's reach and coercive capacity, while communal fragmentation (Lahore Resolution), the resignation of Congress ministries, and the devastating Bengal Famine eroded society's unified capacity to constrain it\u2014despite Congress's continued mass organization."}
